steps.title: Make media the cause
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize the effect media had on Wong Fei-hung's legacy. The notes separate his local recognition during life from his later international folk-hero status, which came through depictions in films, television shows, and other media.

steps.title: Reject weak media links
steps.content: Choice A wrongly credits media for Wong Fei-hung's local reputation as a physician and Kung Fu master. Choice B mentions media depictions but not their effect on his legacy. Choice C places media and international fame side by side without showing that media caused the wider fame. The answer is D.
